name: 9ct 100mm Christmas Interior Glitter Finish Ornament Set Multi Color - Wondershop™
description:
Sprinkle festive cheer on your Christmas tree using this 9-Count 100MM Christmas Interior Glitter-Finish Ornament Set from Wondershop™. This plastic ornament set features nine ball ornaments in assorted colors with interior glitter finishes for a glam touch of shine. Each ornament has a gold-tone cap with a coordinating top loop for easy hanging, and the shatter-resistant construction is ideal for homes with pets or young kids.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
